layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use py-24 to py-32 for section spacing.
layout.section_structure: Editorial grid. On desktop, a 12-column grid where left 4 cols are sticky (Section number, title) and right 8 cols hold the content.
layout.borders: Exposed structural borders. 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) separating sections and grid items to create a technical/Swiss feel.

hero.structure: Massive typography for 'SHREYSHTH_SHARMA'. Monospace status bar at top with live clock, location (Bloomington, IN / London, UK), and availability. Brief 'short version' bio.
hero.motion: Reveal text character-by-character or slide up.

about.structure: Editorial text block with italicized serif accents. A portrait image with a monochromatic/navy filter. Four stat counters at the bottom (e.g., '2 Degrees', '3+ Internships', 'Analytical rigor', '1 Focus').

skills.structure: Bento grid or elegant list of categories (Financial Analysis, Tech Stack, etc.). Use pill-shaped tags for individual skills.

experience.structure: Vertical timeline. Left side dates, right side role, company, description, and skill pills. Clear 1px left border for the timeline track.

projects.structure: Numbered cards (01, 02). Include at least one card featuring a data visualization (built with pure HTML/Tailwind bars or Recharts) representing metric impact (e.g., Intel data processing performance or financial model accuracy).

education.structure: Journey format. Indiana University Bloomington (Origin/Current), LSE (Exchange), CFA Program.

contact.structure: Large 'Let's talk' heading. Grid of big links for Email, LinkedIn, GitHub. Prominent 'Download CV' button.

chatbot.structure: Floating widget bottom-right. Label 'Ask Shreyshth'. When opened, a chat window with pre-filled prompt pills (e.g., 'What is his valuation experience?', 'Download CV').
chatbot.motion: Spring animation on entry and open.

portrait.description: Professional man in suit, use as placeholder for Shreyshth's portrait. Apply grayscale or navy-tint filter in CSS.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page scroll-driven portfolio matching the reference structure but adapted for a finance professional.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for complex layout grids (Swiss/editorial style). Do not over-rely on Shadcn for the main page layout.
Implement scroll animations using Framer Motion (fade up, slide in).
Ensure the hero has a live clock and location status using React hooks.
The 'Ask Shreyshth' chatbot should be a functional UI component (mock the AI response logic with a timeout and static responses).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form elements.

Use Cabinet Grotesk (or similar geometric sans) for large text, Playfair Display for italicized accent words within headings, and IBM Plex Sans for body. Add font imports via Google Fonts/Fontsource in index.css.
For the Project section's metrics, build a sleek bar chart representation of data (e.g., comparing old process vs Shreyshth's optimization).
